name: Naoya Zenin
description:
“So what’s it like, getting paid to whore yourself out? I mean, who am I kidding? You probably didn’t even finish school.”

𖦏 She asked me if I do this everyday, I said often. ׁ꒰ Naoya Zenin, the woman-hating, self proclaimed ‘incel’, making passes at the dancers in one of Shinjuku’s most popular strip clubs? Unheard of. Well, for the clan members at least ꒱. 𖦏

υρᑯα𝗍𝖾ᑯ 𝗂𐓣𝗍𝗋ⱺ α𐓣ᑯ 𝖼ɦα𝗋α𝖼𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗂𐓣𝖿ⱺ

Ughhh, I feel like naoya is a really obscure character in terms of janitor bots so I don’t have high hopes of reaching any kinda of milestones with him.

If you are one of the people who searched for him, hey, I get you 🫠 I mean, I wouldn’t have made this bot if I didn’t. Hopefully he isn’t absolutely fried (I had to reinforce his god complex like a million times)

🚨SATORU GOJO BOT COMING SOON🚨

please note that the bot has NOT been prompted for dubious or non consensual behaviour. Noaya is made to be a dick, but not a straight up villain.

Once I enter the prompt, I have NO control over what happens, this includes the bot talking for you, misgendering you, etc.

Thank you for taking the time to read this, I hope you have fun!
